debug_info.goal:

failed_attempts: op

have h₁ := arr

  simp_all [valConsistent, opReqId?, RequestAddress, RequestType]

      exact x.coherent

        })
    exact h₂
  exact h

have h_main : valConsistent (arr._insert req) = true := by sorry
  exact h_main

have h₁ : valConsistent (arr._insert req) = true := by

      <;> try decide

              <;> try contradiction

          <;> try decide

simp [valConsistent]
  <;> aesop

simp_all [RequestArray._insert]
  <;>

have h₁ : valConsistent (arr._insert req) = true := by
    have h₂ : arr.val.isEmpty → valConsistent (arr._insert req) = true := by
      intro h
      have h₃ : arr.val.size = 0 := by
        simp_all [Array.isEmpty]
      -- If the array is empty, the insert will create a new array with one element
      simp_all [valConsistent, arr._insert, growArray, Nat.toUSize, Fin.ext_iff,
        Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ, Fin.val_one]
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try simp_all [Option.mem_cons, Option.mem_singleton, List.mem_singleton]) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try aesop)
    by_cases h₃ : arr.val.isEmpty
    · -- Case: arr.val is empty
      exact h₂ h₃
    · -- Case: arr.val is not empty
      simp_all [valConsistent, arr._insert, growArray, Nat.toUSize, Fin.ext_iff,
        Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_succ, Fin.val_one]
      <;>
      (try decide) <;>
      (try simp_all [Option.mem_cons, Option.mem_singleton, List.mem_singleton]) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try aesop)
  exact h₁
